---
title: "Book Your Appointment"
description: "Schedule a consultation with EpiPulse professionals through our secure online booking system."
---

# Book Your Appointment

Schedule a consultation with EpiPulse professionals through our online booking platform.

## Quick Booking Guide

### To Schedule Your Appointment:

1. **Click the Booking Link** below
2. **Select Your Service** - Choose the type of consultation you need
3. **Pick Your Time** - Browse available slots
4. **Confirm Details** - Enter your information
5. **Get Confirmation** - Receive details via email/SMS

[**Open Appointment Booking System**](https://epipulse-appointments.railway.app/)

---

## What to Expect

### Before Your Appointment
- Receive appointment confirmation with date, time, and provider details
- Get Google Meet link if it's an online consultation
- Choose a quiet, private space for your consultation
- Have any relevant medical documents ready

### During Your Appointment
- Connect on time via the provided link (for online consultations)
- Discuss your health concerns with the professional
- Receive guidance and recommendations
- Ask clarifying questions

### After Your Appointment
- Receive digital prescription/recommendations via email
- Get follow-up instructions
- Get referrals if needed
- Appointment summary and notes

---

## Common Questions

**Can I reschedule or cancel?**  
Yes, up to 24 hours before your appointment time. Contact us or use the booking system.

**What if it's an online consultation?**  
You'll receive a Google Meet link. Join at your scheduled time from any device with internet.

**Will my information be kept private?**  
Yes, all consultations are confidential and secure.

**Need Help?**  
Contact: appointments@epipulse.org

---

**[Start Booking Now](https://epipulse-appointments.railway.app/)**
